hero.sub: Upload any CV and your template — get it back perfectly reformatted. Nothing lost.
hero.uploadHint: or drop it here · PDF, DOCX, image

converter.templateSubtitle: DOCX or PDF · the format to apply

steps.title: Upload any resume
steps.body: PDF, DOCX, or scanned image — we handle every format.

steps.title: Upload your template
steps.body: The DOCX or PDF that defines the format you want applied.

steps.title: Review and download
steps.body: Check every field side by side, edit anything, then export.

showcase.heading: Any resume, your format.
showcase.sub: Paste any CV in any layout — we reformat it exactly to yours, every time.

items.title: Nothing invented, nothing lost
items.body: We never fabricate content. Anything we can't find in the original is flagged for you to fill — never silently invented.

items.title: Review before it ships
items.body: Side-by-side review screen shows the original next to the reformatted result. Click any field to edit before you export.

items.title: About 20 seconds
items.body: From upload to formatted output in roughly twenty seconds. No queue, no account required to get started.

footer.brandDesc: Reformat any resume into your exact template — in seconds, nothing invented.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

faq.q: What if the result has mistakes?
faq.a: You review and edit every field on the review screen before exporting. Nothing ships until you say so.
TODO: Files are processed in memory and not permanently stored on our servers. Update with real data-retention policy before launch.
Yes — Pro is billed monthly with no lock-in. Cancel any time from your account settings.
